verbGlossary.ADDRESSES: {source} discusses or raises issues pertaining to conditions at this {target}
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED TO: {source}is assigned to be completed at this {target}
verbGlossary.CATALOGUES: {source} systematically lists deficiencies or items organized by this {target}
verbGlossary.CLARIFIES: {source} provides additional design or construction clarification for this {target}
verbGlossary.COVERS: {source} scope encompasses the entirety of this {target} or area
verbGlossary.DELIVERED TO: {source}is delivered to this {target} location for pickup or staging
verbGlossary.DEPICTS: Dra{target} sheet graphically represents the plan, section, or detail of this location
verbGlossary.DETAILS: Shop dra{target} provides fabrication-level dimensional detail for elements at this location
verbGlossary.DIRECTS WORK AT: {source} instructs construction activity to be performed at this {target}
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS: {source}document captures as-installed conditions or operating procedures for this {target}
verbGlossary.FILED FOR: {source} is formally submitted or recorded with respect to this {target}
verbGlossary.MEASURED AT: {source}document measure is tracked or aggregated at this {target} granularity
verbGlossary.PHOTOGRAPHED AT: {source} or video was captured at this {target} as visual documentation
verbGlossary.PINNED TO: {source} entry or photo is geo-tagged or floor-plan-pinned to {target} coordinate
verbGlossary.RECORDS: {source}document preserves the final installed condition at this {target}
verbGlossary.REFERENCES: {source} textually or graphically cites this {target} as relevant context
verbGlossary.REVISES: {source} issues updated design information that changes conditions at this {target}
verbGlossary.SCOPED TO: {source} or plan defines its applicability boundary as this {target}
verbGlossary.SPECIFIES FOR: {source} or product data defines material and performance requirements for this {target} type
